definition: Contemplation of body in the satipaṭṭhāna framework.
notes: Use this record for the body branch of satipaṭṭhāna. Keep it aligned with the headword kāya as body and with formula language such as observing the body in relation to the body.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing the body in relation to the body

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the body branch of satipaṭṭhāna in governed practice contexts.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not narrow this into modern scanning-language or other technique labels unless a source-facing note explicitly requires it.
